entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
My name is Omar Granados, I have been working in the SAP ecosystem for 20+, and I have been an employee of SAP for 10 years. I am now working in Brazil as a Tech Lead for the payrolls of Chile, Colombia, and Venezuela.
I’m happy to join the SAP community

entry.title: Re: Setting Up Programs in the LMS
entry.content:
How do I import programs? I see a connector for curricula but not programs. Thanks, John

John Marshall

703-599-2219

entry.title: iFlow - HTTP operation failed invoking https - 401 Auth Error
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to fetch Token from Ariba API using Basic Auth Credentials.

Getting below error.

 

Error Details
com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occured: HTTP operation failed invoking https://api.ariba.com/v2/oauth/token with statusCode: 401. The MPL ID for the failed message is: xxxxx
 
 
Steps we performed:
Content Modifier>Message Header:
Create - Authorization - Constant - Value: Basic 12345677
 
Http Connection:
https://api.ariba.com/v2/oauth/token
Query: grant_type=client_credentials
 
It is working fine through Postman.
Could you please help.
 
Thank you.

entry.title: How to purge I-9 documents in SuccessFactors Onboarding 1.0 for all the terminated employees
entry.content:
Hi All

Client is using SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 1.0. Can you let me know if it is possible to delete the I-9 documents for all the terminated employees at once. If yes could you please share me the steps to achieve this.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Best Practices for Just Ask
entry.content: Very nicely written. Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Barcelona 2024 Recap
entry.content:
We would like to start our recap with a sincere gratituted to all who contributed making it happen, our attendees, speakers, sponsors and volunteers. This year 2024 with 80+ attendees that made SITBarcelona gathering incredible.

On Thursday evening, staff, friends and speakers of SITBarcelona enjoyed an alltogether informal dinner in a relaxed and friendly atmosphere before the event.

     

This eighth edition of SAP Inside Track Barcelona featured a diverse and engaging program. It included presentations by SAP experts and members of the SAP Community Network, touching on a variety of cutting-edge topics.

Antonio AncosSAP 2024 de la A a la Z
Antonio LeiteKnowledge Graphs with SAP Data
Josetxu FernandezGenAI in SAP Data and Analytics
Fran Villegas

Get Business insights from your SAP data with Natural Language and Develop Gen AI solutions integrating AWS and SAP BTP Services

Alejandro RodriguezSAP BTP Chef: first SAP demo where all the pillars of BTP are shown in a practical business case.
Felipe BorgesGlobal eCompliance with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance
Gregory DoukasTechnician Training Tool powered by Apple Vision Pro and SAP S/4HANA
Maria Codinach and Harsh KumarFrit Ravich's success case in the modernization of sales application: from SMP to in-house middleware
Niranjan GattupalliImplementing gCTS for Continous Delivery in complex S/4HANA landscapes: Branching Models, Hotfix strategies and 5-Tier Architecture
Antonio ValladaresIntegration Suite addon build in SAP CAP by Code10
Bernhard LueckeReinventing Support with AI

Between the sessions at the breaks, were made several raffle to win 2 e-books and 1month free subscription to all attendees thanks to Espresso Tutorials, 2 e-books thanks to SAP PRESS and 5 100€ Gift Cards from SAP Store thanks to CUVIV. Here we would like to thank so much our beloved SAP Champions and friend Nil Peksen who accepted to be on stage and run some of the draws.

In addition to the insightful presentations, the event also featured a hands-on session led by Antonio Maradiaga, a member of the SAP Developer Advocates. This practical session focused on SAP Build Code and demonstrated how to develop applications using Generative AI and SAP's Joule Assistant.

As every past event, remember that all content was recorded and now availabe here. And also all official photos will be published in this album for you.

We would like to specially thank you to SAP people from Spain like  Luis Felipe Lanz, Bernhard Luecke, Jorge Perez, Cesar Martin, Antonio Maradiaga, Rafael Valdes and Carles Viaplana for their continous engament with our local SAP Community and supporting the event to take it to the next level.

As said before, big thanks to all our sponsors who year after year believe and support our SAP Community event:

The event concluded with a great sense of excitement, leaving everyone eagerly anticipating next year’s edition. A heartfelt thanks to all attendees, speakers, sponsors, and volunteers who made it all possible.

SAP Inside Track Barcelona continues to prove itself as one of the most influential events in the SAP community, offering a platform for knowledge sharing, networking, and exploring the latest innovations in the SAP ecosystem.

So, looking forward to meet all of you in SAP Inside Track Barcelona 2025!!

Mireia Bubi, Lluis Salvador, Enric Castella, Losel Tenzin, Imma Salmeron, David Ruiz

entry.title: LISTCUBE Remote Cube - Error reading the data of InfoProvider
entry.content:
Dear all

When I run LISTCUBE for a remote cube I got this messages:

Exception /SCWM/CX_MD_INTERFACE occurred

Error reading the data of InfoProvider <remote cube name>

Message No. DBMAN305

The long text error message says:

Please you help to solve it.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hi @ChandraV @Matt_Fraser @graziela @CarlosAccorsi 

We are in SAP HR 604 and recently upgraded support stacks from J8 to L0. During this upgrade we kept the TUB level at 147 Cyclic K2.

Before we apply support stacks, we ran a full payroll for all payroll area and saved the file (pay period 24 for bi-weekly and pay period 47 for weekly). Then we apply support stacks to L0, ran full payroll again for the same pay period  (pay period 24 for bi-weekly and pay period 47for weekly). Now we compare both the run and find out some discrepancies for Mississippi employees state with holding with a difference of $1.00. This   Scenario is explained below in detail.

EE: XXXXXX in HQ1 (Quality system). This employee is a weekly employee who belongs to payroll area “XX”. When we run payroll ir regular payroll for Pay period 47 2024.

This employee has regular time wage types and one supplemental wage type 3013. The supplemental wage type 3013 has an amount of 30.59. During pre the calculated tax for 30.59 is $2.00 and after implementing support stack, calculated taxes for the supplemental amount for $30.59 is $1.00.

Does anyone has this issues? or if you find any note resolving this... please do let me know.

entry.title: Re: How to get User details in BTP RAP
entry.content: Thanks IngoBraeuninger. This worked.

entry.title: app/router preview looking for a deleted project's path instead of it's own
entry.content:
Hello,

As a newbie at UI5 development, I am following the tutorial: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-create-ui.html

 

I decide to delete the original app MyHANAApp and instead created another App MyHANAApp2.

When I try to preview the ports, they do not work.

On previewing app/router, I got the below error:

#2.0#2024 12 02 18:00:02:348#+00:00#INFO#/Configuration#####m47c58h8##########m47c58h8#PLAIN##Replacing $XSAPPNAME will not take place - 'xsappname' property not found in UAA configuration.#

However, my package.json has the package name as MyHANApp2 and my mta.yaml also has the same name everywhere. On previewing Port 5000 from within MyHANAApp2, it gives the below error:

Error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/app/index.css'
    at Object.readFileSync (node:fs:457:20)
    at get html [as html] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/app/index.js:10:16)
    at /home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/server.js:85:39
    at Layer.handle [as handle_request] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/layer.js:95:5)
    at next (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/route.js:149:13)
    at Route.dispatch (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/route.js:119:3)
    at Layer.handle [as handle_request] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/layer.js:95:5)
    at /home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:284:15
    at Function.process_params (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:346:12)
    at next (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:280:10)

 

It looks for MyHANAApp which I have already deleted. 

Also I connected the app with the new HANA Cloud Instance MyHANAApp2-Dev, and deleted the previous HDI Container, However, on going to the Database Explorer tab and refreshing , it does not show the container, but on navigating directly from My HANA Projects or searching manually within the Database Explorer using the + icon, I am able to load the DB Container. Although I think this is irrelevant, but thought of mentioning still

 

I do not want to create a new project with the exact same name as the tutorial, so that I can understand how the various components are interlinked, by resolving this error.

 

It is possible, that I might be a little vague in describing the problem, please let me know if I missed out anything, or should explain anything else in more detail.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: bind bound oData function to UI5 control
entry.content:
Hi @junwu

Yes, it works, but the # is wrong. But that's not my question. I already have a context and want to access the bound function from it.
I come from the list report to the object page, where I have my own fragment in which I define my table. Here it should derive the context independently without js coding from me.

entry.title: Re: #CAP-TechBytes Input Validation
entry.content:
Hello guys,

is it possible in CAP to create custom validation rules in combination with custom annotation based validations to check user input, e.g. if a field should be validated that the given value has a certain length and consists only of upper case values, a custom message like e.g. "Input should contain upper case letters only with length of 3 characters" ? 

As far as I have understood, the CAP standard provides simple validation rules only or is there a validation API I can use for this purpose?

Thanks,

Stephan

entry.title: License type for purchasing user
entry.content:
Hello,

My client is asking what type of license purchasing users consume with the new FUE format, Advanced Use or Core Use.

entry.title: Re: bind bound oData function to UI5 control
entry.content:
Ok, i got it ...

{path : 'namespace.getHierachy()', ...}
I am 100% sure that I have tried this before ... Thanks for your participation!

entry.title: Re: Request: codejam on Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core in the Netherlands
entry.content: Thank you - we have recorded your request, and I've asked Nora to look at it to include in her planning for events in Q1.  She will be in touch to discuss details.

entry.title: Re: SAP Code-Jam Request in Dubai
entry.content: December 2024 is too close I'm afraid. The team has been busy with TechEd on Tour.  But we can discuss planning for it in Q1.  Shilpa from our India team will be in touch to discuss details.

entry.title: Remove Discard Draft button in RAP based fiori apps?
entry.content: Is there a way to remove the Discard Draft button?

entry.title: Re: BTP CodeJam from Mark9
entry.content: I've recorded your request. For the ones in Asia, Shilpa from our team in India will be in touch to discuss details.  For the ones in the US, expect an email from me to discuss in more details.

entry.title: Re: is it possible to extend a standard fiori app using v...
entry.content: Q4 2024 update - it is now possible to create adaptation project in Microsoft Visual Studio code according to the following blog - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/introducing-sapui5-adaptation-projects-in-visual-studio-code/ba-p/13580992

entry.title: IPS - transformation - adding a user to a group using patch
entry.content:
Hi all.
In out IAS tenant users are created by replication from SF.
Now we have requirement to update nickname and groups for some users. It should be done by replication from ABAP system.
Base on docs https://help.sap.com/docs/identity-provisioning/identity-provisioning/patched-and-merged-attributes?q=contains  we have prepared a patch transformation. 
It works if only nickName is updated 

 

 

{
    "user": {
        "mappings": [
            {
                "sourcePath": "$",
                "targetPath": "$"
            },
            {
                "targetPath": "$.id",
                "type": "remove"
            },
            {
                "targetPath": "$.id",
                "sourceVariable": "entityIdTargetSystem"
            },
            {
                "targetPath": "$.schemas",
                "type": "remove"
            },
            {
                "targetPath": "$.schemas[0]",
                "constant": "urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:core:2.0:User"
            },
            {
                "targetPath": "$.schemas[1]",
                "constant": "urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:enterprise:2.0:User"
            },
            {
                "targetPath": "$.schemas[2]",
                "constant": "urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:User"
            },
            {
                "targetPath": "$.emails[0].primary",
                "condition": "$.emails[0].length() > 0",
                "constant": true
            },
            {
                "targetPath": "$.meta",
                "type": "remove"
            },
            {
                "constant": "userName",
                "targetVariable": "entityCorrelationAttributeName"
            },
            {
                "sourcePath": "$.userName",
                "targetVariable": "entityCorrelationAttributeValue"
            },
            {
                "targetPath": "$.schemas[0]",
                "constant": "urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:2.0:PatchOp",
                "scope": "patchEntity"
            },
            {
                "targetPath": "$.meta",
                "type": "remove",
                "scope": "patchEntity"
            },
            {
                "targetPath": "$.Operations[0].op",
                "condition": "$.nickName EMPTY false",
                "constant": "add",
                "scope": "patchEntity"
            },
            {
                "targetPath": "$.Operations[0].path",
                "condition": "$.nickName EMPTY false",
                "constant": "nickName",
                "scope": "patchEntity"
            },
            {
                "sourcePath": "$.nickName",
                "targetPath": "$.Operations[0].value",
                "condition": "$.nickName EMPTY false",
                "scope": "patchEntity"
            },
            {
                "targetPath": "$.Operations[1].op",
                "constant": "add",
                "scope": "patchEntity"
            }
        ]
    }
}

 

 

The problem occurs when we want to update the group

following code is added to the transformation 

 

 

            {
                "targetPath": "$.Operations[1].op",
                "constant": "add",
                "scope": "patchEntity"
            },
            {
                "targetPath": "$.Operations[1].path",
                "constant": "groups",
                "scope": "patchEntity"
            },
            {
                "targetPath": "$.Operations[1].value",
                "constant": "xxxxxx-7f28-4b83-9aaf-xxxxxx",
                "scope": "patchEntity"
            }

 

 

And error is generated

Question, how to prepare correct transformation for user group update?

A.

entry.title: 🎄💻Advent of Code 2024: Exploring UI5
entry.content:
The Advent of Code (AoC) is an annual event that excites the programming SAP community every December. It's a series of daily coding challenges that run from December 1st to December 25th, offering a fun and engaging way to improve your coding skills. This year, let's dive into how you can tackle these challenges using UI5, a powerful framework for building enterprise-ready web applications.

Getting Started with UI5

To get started with UI5 for Advent of Code, you'll need to set up your development environment. Here are the basic steps:

  1. Install Node.js and npm: UI5 requires Node.js and npm for development. You can download and install them from the official Node.js website.
  2. Set Up UI5 CLI: The UI5 Command Line Interface (CLI) is a powerful tool that helps you manage your UI5 projects. Install it using npm:
npm install --global @ui5/cli
npm install --global yo
npm install --global create-easy-ui5

This simple example demonstrates how UI5 can be used to create interactive solutions for Advent of Code challenges. By leveraging UI5's powerful features, you can build robust and visually appealing applications to solve even the most complex problems.

Github repo for AoC 2024
https://github.com/yogananda-muthaiah/adventofcode2024

SAP UI5 Components

https://ui5.sap.com/#/controls

SAP UI5 Icons Explorer

https://ui5.sap.com/test-resources/sap/m/demokit/iconExplorer/webapp/index.html

Live Editor

https://ui5.sap.com/#/liveEditor

UI5 Tooling

https://sap.github.io/ui5-tooling/stable/

UI5 Linter

https://github.com/SAP/ui5-linter

Conclusion

Advent of Code is a fantastic opportunity to sharpen your coding skills and have fun with the global programming community. Using UI5, you can enhance your solutions with rich UI components and efficient architecture. So, get ready to code, learn, and enjoy the Advent of Code 2024 with UI5!

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024

entry.title: Re: IPS - transformation - adding a user to a group using patch
entry.content: To Build Transformation between Source & Target Systems JSON Path will save your time and make you better to build.. Paste your JSON payload from source system and identify the path to update in your Transformation to Target Systems fields. Kindly refer the below blog which will speed your build. https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/understanding-of-sap-ips-transformation-logic-to-map-source-amp-target/ba-p/13549783 https://jsonpath.com

entry.title: Re: Proposal to Host SAP Community Events in Bhubaneswar
entry.content: For the inside track request please send a separate request to the email community@sap.com

entry.title: Re: Analytical Insights in Joule (powered by SAP Analytics Cloud), Controlled release in Q1 2025
entry.content:
Fascinating update! It’s exciting to see progress, but I was really hoping to see SAP Datasphere Knowledge Graphs integrated with Just Ask/Joule. Knowledge graphs are being frequently highlighted in discussions and announcements, yet there’s still a lack of clarity on how they’ll be utilized.
From this blog post, it seems the functionality is limited to acquired data. I was expecting Just Ask to leverage the power of knowledge graphs for deeper, more intuitive insights. Hopefully, we’ll see more development in this area soon!

entry.title: Re: Items not appearing in library despite being uploaded...
entry.content: @carlaravazzano, the SAP Support channel would be the appropriate one to analyze this situation, as internal actions might be required. After the waiting period (8 hours for prod.), the courses should be available in the libraries the user has access to.

entry.title: Re: Create a new Z field in ME21N/ME22N/ME23N under Deliv...
entry.content:
Hello @bobi04 

That is not possible unless you are willing to modify SAP standard screens. Purchase order custom fields are displayed in a dedicated tab. 

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors mobile App - How to not open content w...
entry.content: @Nina09, if I understood your situation correctly, as it stands, that wouldn't be possible. Additional details can be found in the KBA 2959751.

entry.title: Re: An error occurred while communicating with the OData server to retrieve metadata.
entry.content: Hi Luis, Are you still facing the issue?

entry.title: Re: Inquiry about issues stopping replication flow.
entry.content: This problem recently started in our production environment and it's really strange that we cannot stop or kill the stuck job. I have raised an incident with SAP and hoping that they will resolve it quicker. I'll let you know once we have the solution is place.

entry.title: Filter variable inside a People Analytics history
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

Customer wants to confirm with SAP if it is possible to create a filter variable inside a People Analytics history so that the history can have some filter variables as it is possible to do in a ECP reports. Can you confirm us that this kind of actions can be done in a People Analytics history, please.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Access to Emarsys FTP
entry.content:
We need the access credentials for the FTP provided by the Emarsys environment, including the Server Address, username, and password. How can we get the access data again?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Access to Emarsys FTP
entry.content:
According to SAP Emarsys Help, you can check the Smart Insight FTP server and username at Management > Smart Insight Settings > FTP Account. The password is only shown once when Smart Insight was configured. In case you don't remember the password, you can use the "Regenerate Password" button at the tool mentioned above to create a new password.

  • SAP Emarsys Help: Smart Insight Self-Service tool — Setting up your SFTP account
  • SAP Emarsys Help: The FTP Account tab

entry.title: Re: Prepare step: Batch unique at material and client lev...
entry.content:
Hello, Vishwa! Hope you're doing well!

The root cause of this error is very likely related to the fact that the MO (Migration Object) was copied using LTMOM. There doesn't seem to be any misconfiguration in place from what you described, as you mentioned that the standard MO is working fine and the system's batch level is set to material level.

As explained by the SAP Note 2481235, copied MOs using LTMOM become user-defined MOs, decoupling from their original standard template. Even though the standard MO is used as reference for the copy, the decoupling can have a series of consequences, such as unexpected errors that don't occur with their fully standard counterparts.

To confirm if that's the root cause of the error, you could try uploading the exact same sample data to the fully standard MO and check if the errors are thrown too!

If no errors are thrown, the copied MO is the root cause of this error message! You'd need to either proceed with the usage of the standard MO, or, if necessary for some reason, create a new Migration Project with the fully standard MO.

I hope that helps! Good luck with your data migration activities!

Best regards,
Caio

entry.title: Re: Vendor: Withholding Tax NOT extended in new company code
entry.content:
Hi!

I tried with this note and the following, but I still have the same problem

https://me.sap.com/notes/1514078/E https://me.sap.com/notes/982566/E https://me.sap.com/notes/979035/E https://me.sap.com/notes/2601465/E

entry.title: Crystal Report - Join Queries
entry.content:
Hi,
I am sorry if this is in the wrong board, I don't know where to post this.

I am relatively new to Crystal Reports and I need to accomplish this.

Basically what I need is if the item has Onhand > 0 and the sales for the date parameter is 0, include it on the report

Table 1:
Invoice # Date Item Quantity
1000 03/01/24 ABC1 10
1001 03/01/24 DEF1 20
1002 04/01/24 ABC1 20

Table 2
Item Onhand
ABC1 40
DEF1 50
GHI1 200
JKL1 250

I have a date parameter so the user enters in a from and to date range.

Date Range 03/01/24 to 03/31/24
Item Onhand Sales
GHI1 200 0
JKL1 250 0
(item ABC1 and DEF1 are in the date range)

Date Range 03/01/24 to 04/30/24
Item Onhand Sales
JKL1 250 0
(item ABC1, DEF1 and GHI1 are in the date range)

Can someone help with this? I have been working on it for a while and I am stuck.

entry.title: RISE Base Option VPN amount
entry.content:
Hi SAP team

 

Colud you please clarify how many S2S VPNs does the customer right under RISE private cloud base option?

As per my intepretation of R&R document, customer can deploy 5 S2S VPN, however I will appreciate your clarification

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: SSO Setup with SSO360
entry.content:
On the Emarsys Help pages there are three described ways tho enable SSO for Emarsys:

 

SAP IAS: https://help.emarsys.com/hc/de/articles/360017272277-Single-Sign-On-Single-Sign-on-mit-dem-SAP-Identity-Authentication-Service-aktivieren

Azure IAS: https://help.emarsys.com/hc/de/articles/8952357005457-Single-Sign-On-Aktivieren-von-Single-Sign-On-mit-Microsoft-Azure

Okta IAS: https://help.emarsys.com/hc/de/articles/15006326541970-Single-Sign-On-Single-Sign-On-mit-Okta-aktivieren

 

Is it also possible with other SSO Systems like SSO360? https://www.paraviewsoft.com/products/single-sign-on


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SSO Setup with SSO360
entry.content:
According to SAP Emarsys Help page below, the current instance of SSO should work with any SAML 2.0 compatible IdP, but it was tested only with Microsoft Azure and SAP Identity Authentication Service as of now. Other than these two, you will need to configure it at your end, and this is something your IT department to handle and configure based on your system.

  • SAP Emarsys Help: Single Sign-on: Support functionality

The same Help page above describes the details, such as entity ID, assertion service URL, etc, required by Emarsys SSO in order for the provider to work.

entry.title: Re: Creation Large amount of Meter Reading Orders via ISU_S_METERREAD_CREATE | MSG EL422
entry.content:
Hi Kartin,

thanks for your reply but could you give the reasons why I should use the BAPI. 
I think I am missing something crucial here because I thought BAPI are meant to be used with non-SAP
most of the time. Or is the BAPI in this case the way to handle creation of Meter Reading Documents.

Best Regards,

ud39

entry.title: Change "System" in Work Zone application
entry.content:
Hello,

We've built applications in Work Zone to access ABAP backend functions; we had the need to rename a few Destinations in BTP, which are used in the System drop down when creating these applications.

When doing so the rest of the fields in the Application get reset to default losing all configuration, which basically equals to recreating the Application.

Is there any way to change the target System within an Application without losing the configuration?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Showed "Couldn't load file" in Payable Analytics"
entry.content:
Hi PhooPyae23 

Please create an OSS incident to report this type of issues. SAP support will take a look.

Thank you.

Javier del Peso

entry.title: DRFOUT Error
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am facing the error Material group Hierarchy processing is not active when trying to do DRFOUT from S/4 to CAR system.  Screen shot attached.

Let me know if anyone faced the same issue and how was it resolved.

entry.title: Creating database in CCC
entry.content:
Hi All,

How do you install the SBOCOMMON database manually in CCC?

entry.title: Re: Fiscal Representative and Plant Abroad in SAP S/4Hana...
entry.content:
Hi amarmodanwal

RITA is the S/4Hana Public Cloud solution for the ECC Plant Abroad. See the help on RITA

Registration for Indirect Taxation Abroad (RITA) | SAP Help Portal

You can see in the How to Videos Part 2, the configuration (it might be different from ECC)

How to Configure and Maintain Your System After the Migration and Activation | SAP Help Portal

How-To Videos for RITA | SAP Help Portal

Please follow the tax box mapping instructions so that your foreign transactions are reported in the specified location on your tax reporting forms. For more information, see Tax Box Mapping.

Tax Box Mapping | SAP Help Portal

This part is also explained in the how-to-videos. Also read the note in the help to understand the restrictions and limitations of RITA.

Regards,

Javier del Peso

entry.title: Re: BI Support Tool runs very slow.
entry.content: We are running BI Support Tool version 2.1.15 with SAP Host Agent 7.22sp65 Maybe I should roll back. I did end up creating a case with SAP. I'll see what they say.

entry.title: Re: BI Support Tool runs very slow.
entry.content: -------------------- SAPHOSTAGENT information -------------------- kernel release 722 kernel make variant 722_EXT_REL compiled on Linux GNU SLES-11 x86_64 cc4.3.4 for linuxx86_64 compiled for 64 BIT compilation mode Non-Unicode compile time Sep 13 2024 22:43:04 patch number 65 latest change number 2252882 --------------------- supported environment. --------------------- operating system Linux

entry.title: Re: Inquiry about issues stopping replication flow.
entry.content:
Hi All,

so as I mentioned on previous comment. I did open a ticket with SAP and they acknowledged the issue and will add the fix. here is their response: "We plan to implement a fix in the DIG component to address the inconsistency found in the DIG API response."

The workaround (works 90% of the time) is to after you press the "Stop" button, wait few minutes for the job be stopped in the background. Then press the "stop" button again. You will see an error message saying something like "Replication flow cannot be stopped...." Close the message, refresh the data monitor job. The status should be refreshed. 

hope this helps some of you.

entry.title: Product Compliance - Tables used for REACH SVHC
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am looking for the tables in SAP S/4HANA that store information about substance types for materials, such as whether a material is classified as a Substance of Concern or a Substance of Very High Concern (SVHC).

My primary goal is to identify and link this information for sustainability reporting purposes (e.g., SAP SCT).

If you could share resources related to tables used for substance classifications or SAP Product Compliance topics, I would greatly appreciate it.

Best regards,
Alina

entry.title: Re: DRFOUT PMCH S4/HANA to CAR
entry.content: How did you resolve this issue ? what is the root cause I am also facing same issue during DRFOUT replication.

entry.title: CDS Views: return most recent record
entry.content:
Hi,

I am new to CDS View and I am facing a simple problem I guess.

My CDS View entity is defined as:

define view entity ZV_SER03
  as select from ZV_OBJK_1_MAX as objk
  association [1] to ser03 on ser03.obknr = objk.obknr
{
  key ser03.obknr,
      objk.matnr,
      ser03.datum,
      ser03.uzeit
}
where
      ser03.werk     = objk.b_werk
  and ser03.lagerort = objk.b_lager
  and ser03.shkzg    = 'S';

And here is an example of the result it returns:

matnr;obknr;datum;uzeit
0000000000002364065;32983;20270605;160321
0000000000002364065;33043;20230606;113445
0000000000006666666;33047;20240606;113526
0000000000066666666;33048;20230606;114025
0000000000007777777;33051;20230606;114117

From this example I would like to create a new CDS view entity that returns for each MATNR/OBKNR the most recent record, from the datum and uzeit fields.

The result from the example above should therefore be:

matnr;obknr;datum;uzeit
0000000000002364065;32983;20270605;160321
0000000000006666666;33047;20240606;113526
0000000000007777777;33051;20230606;114117

Thanks in advance for your help.

entry.title: Re: Issue with API Authorization in S/4HANA Cloud Public...
entry.content:
Hi @sdebeaulieu / Severin,

I understand you'd like to establish user propagation with your SAP BTP-based Fiori app you designed to extend an S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition application.

You may want to configure this extension like a custom integration with an integration scenario. This SAP Developer YouTube video might help. I forwarded it to about 32:40, where that style of side-by-side setup is highlighted with its 8 steps. Note the integration token in step 2 and the user role assignment in step 8. https://www.youtube.com/live/d1Uy5PEwbtc?si=5AQpQZlFxJlDy89k&t=1953.

entry.title: Re: Unplanned delivery cost on specific GL account
entry.content:
Hi EliDm 

It's not possible to do the distribution by cost centers, so you will need to assign a default cost center to that GL account.

I don't think that via custom logic you can do the distribution neither, as you will not be able to add line items to the posting.

I suggest you post to a default cost center, then via allocation cycle you do the distribution to the cost centers you need.

Regards,

Javier del Peso

entry.title: Re: Automatic approval for maintenance orders workflow is not working
entry.content: I have the same problem, have you found the solution?

entry.title: Re: Error Message no. CJ055 'PEP element is already imput...
entry.content:
Hi borja82 

You cannot delete the WBS element as it has dependent objects assigned
to it, such as networks, network activities, orders, purchaser requisitions, or purchase orders.

Regards,

Javier del Peso

entry.title: Re: Why is Hungarian Notation Harmful?
entry.content:
It's been only 9 years since the last Great Hungarian Notation debate on SCN. 🙂

I have to admit I make some exceptions for parameter (p_) and sometimes importing/exporting stuff in the methods. But there is no value whatsoever in lv_, <fs...> and whatever wa is supposed to be.

Sadly, examples in ABAP documentation don't have our back here. It's littered with itab and wa and "JOIN sflight AS a" and other lazy, unreadable code. Would be very nice if someone finally cleaned those up.

P.S. If someone feels oppressed by their local guidelines / senior developers, here is a post for you.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to perform GR for Purchase order autom...
entry.content:
Thank you for your request, @SOULA1 , 

If I understand you correctly - and pelase correct me if I'm wrong, you'd like to automate the documentation along the goods receiving process, right? Generally speaking, the response is yes, but you probably need a response closer to the specific scenario you are implementing. Let me hence point you to the configuration and test documentation for business scope items in the app "SAP for Me": Process Navigator - SAP for Me. When you select Line of Business "Sourcing and Procurement" you'd get a selection of solution processes, some of which have business process automation in their name, like J82 or 42K. Some others may have integration in their name, like 2EJ, or Direct procurement with inbound delivery (2TX). The exact configuration is described in the respective scope item, in the setup guide or in the test script, depending on the scenario.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Group Reporting Analytics – Reporting Item API and MDA based Analytical Reports
entry.content:
Hello,

 

is it posible to see the videos, I have the same error, any advise on this?

entry.title: Re: Automatic approval for maintenance orders workflow is...
entry.content:
Buenas tardes:

al final pude hacer que si llegara la autorización a mi bandeja creando la orden 

en la app gestion de workflow pude parametrizar por costo planeado

el orden de las reglas es importante

los pasos del 

Pasos de workflow los parametrice así 

y con esto ya me salia en la bandeja 

Saludos.

entry.title: Re: Did you say FUE? A definition.
entry.content: What systems are applicable to FUE? For example, I have 1 DEV, 1 QA and 1 PRD. I know the PRD system is one, but are the DEV and QA systems also under the FUE model??

entry.title: Re: Custom approval workflow required for timesheet entri...
entry.content:
Thank you for your request, @Nikhil1905 ,

if you'd like to configure a custom approval logic for employee timesheets you might need to implement a custom extension, a so-called BAdI or Business Add-In. Please find more information here in conjunction with the Approval Fiori app SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library.

entry.title: Setup properly SAP Commerce 2205.31 on-prem in local environment.
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

As part of the process to patch our environments, we usually start deploying SAP Commerce On-Prem in a local computer (not a server), and last time we were able to successfully start Hybris (hybrisserver.bat) we applied the 2205.25 package. Now we are trying to move to 2205.31 and we are seeing issues related to what I believe is a solr configuration problem. Does anyone know if we are missing something?

This a portion of the logs, thank you!

Caused by: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "de.hybris.platform.solrfacetsearch.model.config.SolrServerConfigModel.getName()" because "source" is null
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:50.903 |     at de.hybris.platform.solrfacetsearch.converters.populator.DefaultSolrServerConfigPopulator.populate(DefaultSolrServerConfigPopulator.java:42)
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:50.904 |     at de.hybris.platform.solrfacetsearch.converters.populator.DefaultSolrServerConfigPopulator.populate(DefaultSolrServerConfigPopulator.java:33)
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:50.904 |     at com.spareparts.core.converters.GACAbstractPopulatingConverter.populate(GACAbstractPopulatingConverter.java:33)
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:50.904 |     at de.hybris.platform.converters.impl.AbstractConverter.convert(AbstractConverter.java:34)
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:50.904 |     at de.hybris.platform.solrfacetsearch.converters.populator.DefaultIndexConfigPopulator.getSolrConfigFromItems(DefaultIndexConfigPopulator.java:135)
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:50.905 |     at de.hybris.platform.solrfacetsearch.converters.populator.DefaultIndexConfigPopulator.populate(DefaultIndexConfigPopulator.java:46)
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:50.905 |     at de.hybris.platform.solrfacetsearch.converters.populator.DefaultIndexConfigPopulator.populate(DefaultIndexConfigPopulator.java:34)
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:50.905 |     at com.spareparts.core.converters.GACAbstractPopulatingConverter.populate(GACAbstractPopulatingConverter.java:33)
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:50.905 |     at de.hybris.platform.converters.impl.AbstractConverter.convert(AbstractConverter.java:34)
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:50.905 |     at de.hybris.platform.solrfacetsearch.converters.populator.DefaultFacetSearchConfigPopulator.getIndexConfigFromItems(DefaultFacetSearchConfigPopulator.java:53)
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:50.905 |     at de.hybris.platform.solrfacetsearch.converters.populator.DefaultFacetSearchConfigPopulator.populate(DefaultFacetSearchConfigPopulator.java:30)
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:50.905 |     ... 56 more
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:50.905 |
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:50.905 | Dec 02, 2024 2:04:50 PM org.apache.catalina.core.StandardContext startInternal
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:50.905 | SEVERE: One or more listeners failed to start. Full details will be found in the appropriate container log file
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:50.905 | Dec 02, 2024 2:04:50 PM org.apache.catalina.core.StandardContext startInternal
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:50.906 | SEVERE: Context [/backoffice] startup failed due to previous errors
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:52.279 | Dec 02, 2024 2:04:52 PM org.apache.catalina.loader.WebappClassLoaderBase clearReferencesObjectStreamClassCaches
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:52.283 | WARNING: When running on Java 9 or later you need to add "--add-opens=java.base/java.io=ALL-UNNAMED" to the JVM command line arguments to enable ObjectStream cache memory leak protection. Alternatively, you can suppress this warning by disabling ObjectStream class cache memory leak protection.
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:52.302 | Dec 02, 2024 2:04:52 PM org.apache.catalina.loader.WebappClassLoaderBase clearReferencesRmiTargets
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:52.302 | WARNING: When running on Java 9 or later you need to add "--add-opens=java.rmi/sun.rmi.transport=ALL-UNNAMED" to the JVM command line arguments to enable RMI Target memory leak detection. Alternatively, you can suppress this warning by disabling RMI Target memory leak detection.
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:52.318 | Dec 02, 2024 2:04:52 PM org.apache.coyote.AbstractProtocol start
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:52.319 | INFO: Starting ProtocolHandler ["http-nio-9001"]
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:52.349 | Dec 02, 2024 2:04:52 PM org.apache.coyote.AbstractProtocol start
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:52.350 | INFO: Starting ProtocolHandler ["https-jsse-nio-9002"]
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:52.350 | Dec 02, 2024 2:04:52 PM org.apache.coyote.AbstractProtocol start
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:52.351 | INFO: Starting ProtocolHandler ["ajp-nio-0.0.0.0-8009"]
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:52.351 | Dec 02, 2024 2:04:52 PM org.apache.catalina.startup.Catalina start
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:04:52.351 | INFO: Server startup in [657597] milliseconds
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:05:00.766 | Dec 02, 2024 2:05:00 PM org.apache.catalina.loader.WebappClassLoaderBase checkStateForResourceLoading
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:05:00.766 | INFO: Illegal access: this web application instance has been stopped already. Could not load [com.hybris.cockpitng.core.spring.RequestOperationContextHolder]. The following stack trace is thrown for debugging purposes as well as to attempt to terminate the thread which caused the illegal access.
INFO   | jvm 1    | main    | 2024/12/02 14:05:00.768 | java.lang.IllegalStateException: Illegal access: this web application instance has been stopped already. Could not load [com.hybris.cockpitng.core.spring.RequestOperationContextHolder]. The following stack trace is thrown for debugging purposes as well as to attempt to terminate the thread which caused the illegal access.
 
SAP Commerce #hybris #SAP Commerce On-Premise #Patching Hybris
 
Regards, 
Frank

entry.title: Is Hungarian Notation as bad as "everyone" says it is? They are wrong!!! (oops clickbait)
entry.content:
This discussion is a response to this post regarding Hungarian Notation and why it is apparently so awful. It was posted to LinkedIn where it has generated some discussion.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/why-is-hungarian-notation-harmful/ba-p/13950396

I commented in numerous places on the LinkedIn post which references the article, regarding the anti-HN issues which I find unconvincing but eventually my response became long enough that I decided to write something separate.

Having thought about it a bit more I think a lot of people, myself included, have been focusing on the wrong issue. There seems to be a need to "prove" HN is wrong or should not be used. That's not possible because there is no mathematical proof of HN's incorrectness.

In my opinion the question here is: is it a workable solution to a problem?

My answer is "yes", based on history - it has been a workable solution to hundreds of thousands, if not millions, of developers for decades. So to me, for someone to arrive here and state that HN is trash is the height of arrogance. It's like this history does not exist. I am not stuck in the past, I firmly believe in progress but to ignore the current state and even the recent history is really astonishing.

The answer to the question: "Is HN a workable solution?" is clearly a "Yes!" (with a "but" later)

With the recent (last 10 years or so) changes to SAP this has brought a whole new generation of developers into the fold, developers who have not used HN or have been told HN is bad. Having no experience with HN they have probably not questioned this. Now that they are exposed to HN they are horrified and there is so much anti-HN sentiment that I believe a lot of people are just going along with that, unquestioningly.

The thing is HN is an agreed upon convention, nothing else. Why have so many developers adopted it? Because it worked.

I don't mind changing the agreement and we all use something else but I am very tired of so many people smugly stomping on HN and in very superior tones telling everyone how bad it is and how backward it's supporters are when they (most of them anyway) clearly have very little understanding of the history on the SAP platform. To make these statements is actually quite embarrassing. Not only that their arguments are lame, full of holes and unconvincing.

If someone had to come along and say: "Hey, I know you guys have been using HN for decades but I have something better and I think you should change. Here are some amazing and solid reasons why." And then they provided some amazing and solid reasons why the other system is better I would be cheering them on. But this is NOT what is happening. Instead there's lots of people enjoying stomping on HN when they have no context and providing very weak assertions to support their position.

So the question in my mind remains: is HN a workable solution? And the answer is still a "yes" until someone comes along and convinces me otherwise with some great and convincing information.

I just won't respond positively to someone who write article bashing HN and includes statements like this:
"„Brain damaged", to repeat it. Is this the way, we want to talk about our work, we should be proud of?" and expects me to listen to them. Telling me the brain is not wired for HN, or having extensive discussions about local versus global but not talking a single bit about the workability of a solution is not going to move the needle with me.

What I do know is when a dev has done well with HN supporting/maintaining their code is a breeze. When the opposite I spend significant extra time trying to figure out what they've done whether they're using HN or not.

Would I change? Yes, I really don't have a problem with change. 

I have become fairly flexible in that my naming convention is not dependent on some esoteric rules but on the job at hand. If I am working on an ECC system where the devs have used Hungarian Notation I do the same. If I am on an S4/Hana system it depends on the environment, if HN is de rigeur then I use it, if all the devs are naming their variables in a modern way I will too. If I am working in SAP Build doing a RAP app or a SAP Fiori Elements app I use a modern naming convention to name data objects. Usually the customer has a naming conventions document which you can reference to ensure you comply to their standard.

 

This is my first response to the article referenced at the beginning of this post:
"Here is my response (with limited space):

Harm #1: It Encourages Laziness and poor Naming
Here you assume that people naming variables badly in HN will suddenly do a great job when not using HN. Do you have any basis for this assumption other than pulling it out of you ***? [I shouldn't have said it like that, probably a bit rude.] You think no one has named a variable "purchase_order" and then another dev discovers it's a structure or even an internal table? A bad developer using HN is going to still be a bad developer when not using HN.

Harm #2: It Makes Code Harder to Read
"A friend of mine" - this is called anecdotal evidence and is completely irrelevant. I don't think it makes code harder to read. The technical name for this point is "an opinion".
"Our brains are wired" - are you claiming to know how our brains are wired because I reckon you could be up for a Nobel.

Harm #3: It Impairs Our Way of Thinking
On what basis? This just seems to be based on something that works for you. Not really relevant. I have never experienced code completion used in this way to impair my thinking.

Harm #4: It Misleads, It Lies
Lol. Um, see point #1 above.

"lt_kna1, which was actually global." Did HN write this code or did a bad programmer write this code?"
Honestly, I’d rather have no information at all than false information" - I'd rather just have good information.

Harm #5: It Increases the Entry Threshold
This is super-lame. Learning HN is trivial and no more or higher threshold than having to figure out a good way to name your variables not using HN. Assuming that the absence of HN means a dev doesn't have to learn something is false. They still have to learn how to do a good job of naming variables.

You might think I am some major enemy of HN but I am not really opposed to dropping HN but all I see coming from anti-HN peeps are arguments not supportable with factual evidence."

entry.title: Transfer stock from unrestricted to sales order special stock without recipt in CKM3
entry.content:
Hello.

Our customer has a requirement it's about let him work with two options make to stock or make to order we do that from requirement view and the scenario as follows if he wants to do make to order the requirements will transfer the requirements and he can runs MRP and do confirmation on the planned order and if he has finished unrestricted stocks he will do transfer MVT 412 E but the problem is about the option for MVT 412 E once he does that in the CKM3 the

How can we proccedd with those options and fix the problem for MVT412

entry.title: Re: #COE#BUMA OSS Case Dashboard and SAP For Me Cases API...
entry.content: We're partner, we want to automate the creation of Incident ticket whenever we created an OSS case via SAP For Me or at least integrate that when we create an OSS case and a corresponding SNOW Incident ticket, there will be an API which can handle auto update of worknotes depending on what was updated in the OSS case.

entry.title: Re: Purchasing Info Record number range in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Thank you for your request, @gg8 ,

please follow the SAP Help for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition according to the customer's Configuration Environment of SAP S/4HANA Cloud | SAP Help Portal  as they are different for 2- or 3-system landscapes.

entry.title: Re: How To Plan in SAP TM using TransportationOrderGenericRequest_In
entry.content:
Hi,

We have S4 2022 version and we try to create FO with the TransportationOrderGenericRequest_In

We follow this and other post step by step to build the XML Request in based, that means, external planning ID and the other recommendations, but at the moment of process the request, the system show the message

 

Anyone have the same message? Thanks in advance

Regards,

entry.title: Re: #COE#BUMA OSS Case Dashboard and SAP For Me Cases API...
entry.content:
Hi BUMA, do you want to create it in your customer's own SNOW system ? So in this case you want to read from the Case from SAP for Me? I don't believe there is a public API for SAP for Me at this time as it is a central portal for many services. You could possibly parse something from the UI of https://me.sap.com/servicessupport/cases (you can at least download to Excel from there).

Unfortunately, I don't think this question should be tagged for SAP S/4HANA Cloud public edition.

Thank you,

Jerry

entry.title: Re: CDS for Customer hierarchy
entry.content: Hi Jagadhatri, have you tried actual APIs for Business Partner? https://api.sap.com/products/SAPS4HANACloud/apis/all, then search with Business Partner

entry.title: Re: iFlow - HTTP operation failed invoking https - 401 Auth Error
entry.content: Passed Client ID and Client Secret instead Basic Auth. It fixed the issue.

entry.title: Re: An error occurred while communicating with the OData...
entry.content:
@Luis1001Please check if the metadata is retrieved from the backend (via Cloud Connector) in Mobile Services. Please do the following:

  1. In the Mobile Connectivity section, click the Launch in Browser icon for the given destination. This should open a new tab.
  2. Verify if the OData service document is displayed. You can append $metadata to the URL to check if the metadata is successfully retrieved.
    • If successful, the metadata should be visible.
    • If not, do you get any error?

entry.title: Re: iFlow - HTTP operation failed invoking https - 401 Au...
entry.content: Passed Client ID and Client Secret instead Basic Auth. It fixed the issue.

entry.title: Re: Adding BP roles via Migration Cockpit
entry.content:
Hi, Tony!

The Migration Objects "Customer - extend existing record by new org levels" and "Supplier - extend existing record by new org levels" both have the addition of BP roles in the scope of their migration purposes! You can check which one best fits to your needs by analyzing their official documentation, below:

  • Customer - extend existing record by new org levels | SAP Help Portal
  • Supplier - extend existing record by new org levels | SAP Help Portal

You can also check another similar thread that was posted in the SAP Community, although more specifically tailored to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and involving other alternatives besides the Migration Cockpit:

  • mass add BP role in existing BP | SAP Community

I hope this helps with your query!

Best regards,
Caio

entry.title: Re: Problem using Business Object Interface in Action RAP
entry.content: Hi. Without any further context this is hard to say from the outside. Just by convention it looks like you are trying to modify an import parameter, i_salesordertp, not the result parameter. You may want to create the outbound dataset first, then operate on it.

entry.title: Re: Can I use workforce in SAP DM without integration to...
entry.content: Hi! If my answer was helpful, please consider accepting it as solution.

entry.title: Path Variables in Integration Flow
entry.content:
Hi,

How to Pass Path Variables (Path Parameters) in iflow http connection.

We are building an Ariba API, need to pass ViewTemplate. We tried to pass as below but still get error saying the Template not found.

{
"viewTemplateName": "Test_Re",
"filters":
{
"updatedDateFrom":"2024-10-05T20:30:45Z",
"updatedDateTo":"2024-12-05T20:30:45Z"
}
}

entry.title: Need to vendor and customer invoice at the STO process in same company plants
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are showing a demo of the STO process this Saturday, but the customer is asking for vendor and customer invoices at the STO process in the same company plants.

How can we achieve the vendor and customer invoices at the STO process?

Please provide a user guide and let me know if this is possible or not in the public cloud.

If not possible, provide any other workaround.

Thanks & Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Need to vendor and customer invoice at the STO proces...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

For the STO scenario, you can refer to the following best practices:

Advanced Intercompany Stock Transfer (5HP)

Intercompany Stock Transfer (1P9)

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to perform GR for Purchase order autom...
entry.content: Hi Andreas, would you please further advise in which test script of the mentioned scope items can the process of Auto GR can be found? Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Re: PAIN 002 - 2YM
entry.content:
Hi,

 

there is no such API. For such cases I would recommend to have a look into the MBC (Multi-Bank-Connectivity) scope item 16R.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Where to maintain base calculation and percentage overhead rates for costing?
entry.content:
We have to maintain "Define calculation base" & "Define percentage overhead rates" for product costing. Where is this maintained in Public Cloud?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Where to maintain base calculation and percentage ove...
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


This is set in configuration activity (SSCUI) 102922 - "Define Costing Sheets" in your CBC System (or Manage Your Solution), kindly refer to the SAP Help Portal documentation below:

Costing Sheet


Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Purchasing Info Record number range in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content: Hi @AndreasMuno, Would you please further advise in which SSCUI/Activity in CBC can be used to set the number range?

entry.title: Re: Email recipient of the PO form from ME23N from messag...
entry.content: Hi @prachijirafe, I have checked and searched in SAP internal system there is not avaiable CDS view to find the details of the mail address used to send pdf to customer.

entry.title: Re: Adopting General Display Name
entry.content:
Hi @HarveyXu 

There are some questions from Japan SF team. We would appreciate your answer to these. 

In Japan, names are written in the order of family name followed by first name, rather than first name followed by family name. This is also the case in several other countries outside of Japan. Therefore, the ability to manage names in the family name- first name order within the system is a highly important feature for Japanese customers.

The questions :  

  1. From this blog below, it seems that the General Display Name(first name followed by family name) will be mandatorily applied without an opt-out option in the 2025 1H release. Is it confirmed that the mandatory application without an opt-out option will take place in the 2025 1H release?
    1. https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/general-display-name-opt-out-in-second-half-of-2024/ba-p/13788895
  2. After General Display Name(First Name Last Name) is mandatorily applied without an opt-out option, is there any way customer can change the name display to Last Name First Name? 

Best regards, 

Atsushi Ohori

entry.title: Re: How to Customize Order Forms (CSV Output) in SAP S/4H...
entry.content: Hi @SI_y_Ito, you can find more details from the scope item 1LQ and set the output channel EDI for output of PO. https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2408/SolP/1LQ

Hi 

Following link can be used to get PTO docs.

Regards

Puneet

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Fixed Asset Legacy Data Migration
entry.content:
Hi Anand,

Thanks for the blog.

I've one question in the version of S/4 1709.

How could I debug the field mapping rule? As you may know, there's not the debugging button in the toolbar, which seems only to be appeared since S/4 1809.

I know the mapping occurred. Then I put the breakpoints (both external and internal) in the lines of field mapping rule, but the system would not be stopped at that point.

Thanks

Oliver

entry.title: Re: PR not generate after run MRP for spare
entry.content: Add Manufacturing tag as these PRs are generated by MRP process, please remove other tags.

entry.title: How can we delete our global account?
entry.content:
Who is our SAP contact to assist with this request

S0018488361

Approach Solutions Pty Limited

sandy.eastman@approach-solutions.com

entry.title: Re: How to change SAP GUI color by SAP system SID (Base on SAP GUI 7.4)
entry.content: Thanks. This was good. I am also looking for a blog that explains how to change the branding image by SID & client. I'm following the explanation in SAP Help but it just isn't working for me.

entry.title: When uploading bank statements, error: Currency USD not permitted in account / 1234567890
entry.content:
Let's assume the following situation: You upload a bank statement file into your system. It contains two statements (or more).

Statement one is for bank account 0987654321 which has the currency configured in EUR in the Manage Bank Accounts master data app.

Statement two is for bank account 1234567890 which has the currency USD. 

Now suddenly you see the error message in the log and the upload fails.

entry.title: Re: When uploading bank statements, error: Currency USD n...
entry.content:
In this case you have most likely added an alternative account number which is already in use by another bank account in your system. This won't work.

 

So for instance here it's most likely the case, that bank account 1234567890 has the alternative bank account number maintained as 0987654321. The system has a fuzzy search, when validating the bank account master data mentioned in the file. It will try to fetch the correct bank account. Because we maintained a bank account with 0987654321 and also used this as an alternative bank account number for bank account 1234567890 - which has a different currency. The system is getting confused.

 

So remember: do not use alternative bank account numbers for already maintained bank account numbers in your system.

entry.title: Supply Chain Logistics Visibility Transformed for Enhanced Customer Satisfaction
entry.content:
How valuable is effective communication with customers and stakeholders along a supply chain?  Invaluable.

Effective communication to customers and stakeholders reporting on shipment status can elevate customer satisfaction and foster brand loyalty.  But making sure the communication is efficient can help logistics, fulfillment, and customer service operations stay lean and drive competitive advantage. 

SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace can automate template-based email notifications based on "if-then" rules-based conditions, sending a shipment tracking link to customers, external and internal stakeholders… essentially anyone you want to be aware and self-sufficient in tracking shipment status and ETA, letting them know that the shipment is on the way, if there is a delay, or other change in status.

Automating customer communication of shipment status while you keep your logistics visibility in the context of your purchase, sales, or stock transfer orders, enables the agility to build a stronger supply chain and deliver on your customer promises. 

See the solution in action in this new video, and get the details on this and other new capabilities of SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace. 

 

Learn more about Why Logistics Visibility Is Essential To Modern Supply Chains from this webinar with SAP Business Network for Logistics customer Yamaha Motor Corporation.

entry.title: How to change field label for public cloud
entry.content:
Hello, experts:

May I ask whether there is a way to customize an already exist field's label.

For this case, "Material Group 1" under Sales 2 view of material master is what I want to change, since my client requires more dimensions to track their product, and only problem I left is to change field label.

entry.title: Re: Creating a Dynamic Formatted Search Query for Send Me...
entry.content:
The code for the Send Message FMS is something like this:

IF $[$10.V_1] = 20 --Goods Receipt PO
  BEGIN
    SELECT CardCode from OPDN WHERE DocNum = $[$10.V_0]
  END
ELSE IF $[$10.V_1] = 21 --Goods Return
  BEGIN
    SELECT CardCode from ORPD WHERE DocNum = $[$10.V_0]
  END

entry.title: Inquiry on Printing Multiple Documents in LO-HU
entry.content:
I am creating this incident to seek assistance with the functionality of printing multiple documents simultaneously within the Handling Unit Management (LO-HU) component. 


The goal is to streamline our operations by enabling the printing of multiple documents at once, which would enhance efficiency and reduce manual effort.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Inquiry on Printing Multiple Documents in LO-HU
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I don't see an application which can select specific multiple handling units and print them together.

But it is possible set conditions to print handling units automatically at APP Output Parameter Determination, Determination step -> Output Relevance.

 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/32da8359c8ee4e8b8e8c5e15cacba5aa/36597ffd10024278bdb455c22bfd8c60.html?locale=en-US

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: Make fields editable based on Login user.
entry.content: Thanks a lot for your answer Kai. Is there a way that can do only with the Key-user extensibility. I don't want to use the developer extensibiliy.
